steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank must be a complete clause that follows “why” and ends before “The hazy middle layer...” begins a new sentence.

steps.title: Apply the indirect question rule
steps.content:
Clauses after “why” require normal word order (subject-verb) with a period ending the sentence.

C correctly provides “Uranus is a different shade of blue than Neptune.” with normal order and a period.

A and D both use inverted word order (“is Uranus...”), violating indirect question syntax; B uses normal order but ends with a question mark, making it interrogative instead of declarative.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
